title: [release-1.35] Address CVE-2024-3727
body:
Bump c/image to v5.30.1 and c/common to v0.58.3 to addresses:

CVE-2024-3727
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-35438
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-35441

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *lsm5*, *TomSweeneyRedHat* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.35/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat,lsm5] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I guess if we need to ship this quick on C9S, we could maybe build without FIPS for a while. Don't know what else it would break though. cc @jnovy
Btw. I'm still unable to build this in CentOS.
